current.headline: Your Concrete Hit Strength Three Days Ago. You Waited Seven Because Nobody Put a $125 Sensor in It.
current.critique_notes: All 7 critics at 8.5+. All hard gates pass. Strong original contribution (residential ROI calculation nobody has published). Jake Kowalski voice well-executed. 8 primary sources including 2 Nature papers, ASTM, IRC, and industry data. Minor note: SmartRock3 1000ft range is manufacturer spec (open-air, not embedded in concrete) — acceptable since attributed to Giatec. Academic research section slightly dense but serves rigor well. Hero image generated and validated as JPEG. 2 articles already published today (#237, #238) — SHIP deferred to next cycle.

last_completed.headline: AI Reviewed Your Permit in 15 Minutes. It Missed the Fire Separation. Your AIA Contract Doesn't Say Who Pays.
